div.h2: Why halving encoding has no effect
div.p: Every request — encoding or not — runs the same scoring pipeline (phase 4).
Phase 4 holds blocking_index.read() for ~5-15 ms, starving opposite-side writes.
Encoding (phase 1) runs in parallel across 4 Mutex slots and is not the constraint.

p.strong: The bottleneck is phase-4 lock hold time.

div.p: HELD FOR ALL OF PHASE 4 ~5-15 ms at 100k Starves opposite-side writes
